dict.string: Sprich needs Accessibility access to listen for your global shortcut (Fn+Shift / Fn+Control / Fn+Cmd) system-wide and to paste transcribed text into the focused app.

Sprich reads the active browser tab URL to detect whether you're in Gmail, Slack, Google Chat, or another chat/email surface so it can match the tone of its rewrite. Only the URL is read; nothing is sent to those apps.
Sprich needs microphone access to record your voice for transcription. Audio is sent directly to your chosen provider and never saved to disk.
